name: BKV_NCCR_rearrangement
description: BK virus NCCR rearrangement: archetype BKV (urine isolates) carries an unmodified NCCR with intact O/P/Q/R/S blocks; rearranged BKV isolates found in blood and kidney biopsies of transplant patients with BK-associated nephropathy show duplications, deletions, and block rearrangements that increase early-gene expression and accelerate replication. NCCR sequencing is the gold standard for distinguishing 'reservoir' from 'pathogenic' BKV in transplant medicine.
expected_copy_count: 1 NCCR per genome; rearrangements duplicate/delete subblocks
